Title: Order product > in ""stock qty"" of default FFC decreased
Preconditions:
1. "In stock" qty of the product_1 in the default FFC > 1. 
2. Track inventory = TRUE.

Title: Order more items than are available in the FFC
Preconditions:
1. There is only the default fulfillment center for the store. 
2. Track inventory = TRUE.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the BackEnd. 
2. Go to the product_1.
3. Go to the ""Fulfillment centers"" blade.
4. Go to the fulfillment that is default for the store in which this product is contained. 
5. Set the value of the ""In stock"" field to X. 
6. Go to the StoreFront. 
7. Add product_1 to the cart. 
8. Go to the cart. 
9. Change the ordered quantity of the item to X+1. 
Expected Result:
A warning appears: ""Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X""
Step Description:
1. Change the quantity to X. 

Expected Result:
A warning disappears. You can order X items.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. A warning appears: ""Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X""
2. A warning disappears. You can order X items.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the BackEnd. 
2. Go to the product_1.
3. Go to the ""Fulfillment centers"" blade.
4. Go to the fulfillment that is default for the store in which this product is contained. 
5. Set the value of the ""In stock"" field to X. 
6. Go to the StoreFront. 
7. Add product_1 to the cart. 
8. Go to the cart. 
9. Change the ordered quantity of the item to X+1. 
2. 1. Change the quantity to X.

Title: [VDS-103]Amount of available items = ""in stock"" qty of default and available FFC
Preconditions:
1. Assign to the store default and at least one available FFC.
2. Track inventory = TRUE.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the BackEnd. 
2. Go to the product_1 that is contained in the store from preconditions. 
3. Go to the ""Fulfillment centers"". 
4. Go to the default fulfillment center. 
5. Set the ""In stock"" value to X. 
6. Go to the available FFC.
7. Set the ""In stock"" value to Y. 
8. Go to the StoreFront. 
9. Add product_1 to the cart. 
10. Go to the cart. 
11. Change the quantity of the item to X+Y.
Expected Result:
There is no warning message. You can order such a quantity of the item.
Step Description:
1. Change the quantity of the item to X+Y+1. 

Expected Result:
The warning message is displayed: Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X+Y
Steps (Expected Result):
1. There is no warning message. You can order such a quantity of the item.
2. The warning message is displayed: Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X+Y
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the BackEnd. 
2. Go to the product_1 that is contained in the store from preconditions. 
3. Go to the ""Fulfillment centers"". 
4. Go to the default fulfillment center. 
5. Set the ""In stock"" value to X. 
6. Go to the available FFC.
7. Set the ""In stock"" value to Y. 
8. Go to the StoreFront. 
9. Add product_1 to the cart. 
10. Go to the cart. 
11. Change the quantity of the item to X+Y.
2. 1. Change the quantity of the item to X+Y+1.

Title: Add to cart > Update Inventory > Create order
Track Inventory = FALSE
Preconditions: There is only default FFC for the store.
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Go to the BackEnd.
2. Go to the PRODUCT_1 that is contained in the store from preconditions. 
3. Switch off ""Track inventory"" checkbox. 
4. Go to the default FFC and set the ""In stock"" value to X. 
5. Go to the StoreFront. 
6. Order product_1 in quantities less than X.
7. Go to the BackEnd. 
8. Go to the PRODUCT_1.
9. Go to the default FFC.
10. Pay attention to the ""In stock"" field. 

Expected Result:
The ""In stock"" value still X. 
Step Description:
1. Go to the StoreFront. 
2. Add PRODUCT_1 to the cart. 
3. Change the quantity of PRODUCT_1 to any value higher than X.
Expected Result:
There is no warning message. You can order PRODUCT_1 in quantity higher than X.
Steps (Expected Result):
1. The ""In stock"" value still X. 
2. There is no warning message. You can order PRODUCT_1 in quantity higher than X.
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Go to the BackEnd.
2. Go to the PRODUCT_1 that is contained in the store from preconditions. 
3. Switch off ""Track inventory"" checkbox. 
4. Go to the default FFC and set the ""In stock"" value to X. 
5. Go to the StoreFront. 
6. Order product_1 in quantities less than X.
7. Go to the BackEnd. 
8. Go to the PRODUCT_1.
9. Go to the default FFC.
10. Pay attention to the ""In stock"" field. 

2. 1. Go to the StoreFront. 
2. Add PRODUCT_1 to the cart. 
3. Change the quantity of PRODUCT_1 to any value higher than X.
